features: ICONIC STAR WARS LOGO LIGHT: Light up your world with the legendary Star Wars logo! This stunning light isnтАЩt just a decorationтАФitтАЩs a statement piece that showcases your passion for the galaxy far, far away. Perfect for every Star Wars fan who wants to bring a touch of intergalactic magic to their space!

THE PERFECT GIFT FOR ANY STAR WARS FAN: Wrapped in a sleek, branded gift box, this light makes an unforgettable present for any Star Wars enthusiast. Whether itтАЩs a birthday, holiday, or just a special surprise, itтАЩs sure to make any fanтАЩs day truly stellar.

TRANSFORM YOUR SPACE WITH GALACTIC AMBIANCE: Elevate your man cave, bedroom, games room, or workspace with this Star Wars light. It doesnтАЩt just illuminateтАФit creates a captivating ambiance that makes your room feel like a piece of the Star Wars universe.

VERSATILE POWER OPTIONS FOR MAXIMUM CONVENIENCE: Power up with the included USB cable for a seamless setup, or use 3x AAA batteries (not included) for ultimate portability. Whether youтАЩre setting up in your home or on the go, this light adapts to your needs.

EXCITING LIGHT MODES & FLEXIBLE DISPLAY: Choose between steady phase-on for a classic glow or dynamic pulsing effects for a more exciting vibe. Plus, you can easily mount it on the wall or use it as a freestanding piece, giving you the freedom to showcase it however you like!
description: From the manufacturer This Star Wars Logo Light is the perfect great gift for any fan of the Star Wars franchise. Supplied in a closed, branded gift box it will add the perfect ambiance whilst illuminating any man cave, bedroom, games room, or brighten up a workspace. Plus, any collector of official Star Wars memorabilia would welcome this as the centrepiece of their collection. Measuring 28.5cm (11.2 inches) wide, this awesome light can be powered by either the USB cable that is included or for complete portability 3x AAA batteries (not included) can be used. The lamp features two light modes, either phase-on or pulsing light effects can be selected plus it can be wall-mounted or used free-standing.
